name: Game asset pipeline
service_entrypoint: bash -c 'uv sync; PYTHONPATH=. uv run python scripts/build_preview.py; exec env PYTHONPATH=. uv run python scripts/serve_preview.py'
notes: Ready V1 Phase 1c asset pipeline stack with uv, deterministic transforms, validation, and model-viewer/download preview. Blender/bpy hooks are present but optional until Blender is installed.
